weekly_budget.purpose: Track weekly trends and plan ahead

alerts.daily_warning: Alert if daily spend exceeds $40 (80% of daily limit)
alerts.daily_stop: Stop work if daily spend exceeds $50 (hard limit)
alerts.weekly_warning: Alert if weekly total exceeds $250 (83% of weekly limit)
alerts.monthly_warning: Alert if monthly total exceeds $800 (80% of monthly limit)

optimization_targets.meaning: Use 90% or less of allocated tokens
